text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Aw, that was such a shameful run! I'll never be
able to convince people of the power of feng shui
like this...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...That said, feeling sorry for myself will only
lower my luck even further!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have to hold my head high and keep moving
forward!
choice_data_list: Don't worry! You're definitely making progress!
Don't worry! You're definitely making progress!

For the moment, let's regroup before our next
challenge!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have to hold my head high and keep moving
forward!
choice_data_list: Don't worry! You're definitely making progress!
Don't worry! You're definitely making progress!

For the moment, let's regroup before our next
challenge!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You're right. When you work to improve your
luck, it can take a while to bear fruit. It's
important to stay diligent even when you're not
seeing results!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's the same with training! So, let's keep
practicing for the next race!
choice_data_list: First off, you need a reward for your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah... you're right. It's important to treat yourself.
That's another method of increasing your luck!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I feel like eating something yummy
today! Lead the way, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Harmonizing your inner qi is above all else!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Time to rejuvenate and keep moving forward! I'll
do my best to achieve happiness!
